summary: Update send_email trigger action templates from shared email provider in question to new one
description:
For given existing shared email provider, update all send_email trigger action templates (automated actions & disqualify reasons) to use new shared email provider.

Example body:

{ “trigger_action_templates”: { “from”: 12 } }

Value of “from” is the id of another shared email provider which will be used in action templates

params.name: shared_email_provider_id
params.description: Current Shared Email Provider ID to update trigger action templates (path param))

params.name: trigger_action_templates
params.description: Trigger action templates params (body param, json {“from”: …, “from_kind”: …}})

example_request:
PATCH /c/{company_id}/shared_email_providers/{shared_email_provider_id}/trigger_action_templates

Required params: shared_email_provider_id, automation_actions, trigger_action_templates, company_id
